header.title: Client Profile Form — Confidential
header.required_notice: (*) Marked fields are required; without them, we may not be able to perform the desired treatments.
header.intro: Thank you for completing this form carefully. Your answers help us personalise treatments to suit your individual needs.

doc.number_hint: — enter first to auto-fill existing data

medical.label: Is there any medical information you should share with us?
medical.placeholder: Allergies, surgical interventions, pregnancy, injuries, long-lasting conditions or anything else relevant…

legal.title: Data Protection Notice
legal.text: L'OCCITANE will process your personal data for the following purposes: (i) to manage your enquiries and bookings at the Spa; (ii) to carry out the requested treatments and ensure your safety throughout your visit; (iii) to keep a record of treatments performed in order to personalise future services; (iv) to send marketing communications, where you have given your prior consent; (v) to comply with applicable legal obligations. For further information about how we handle your personal data and your rights as a data subject, please refer to the Privacy Notice available at the Spa reception desk or scan the QR code.

consents.declaration: By completing and signing this form, I declare that I am at least 16 years of age and consent to the collection, use and disclosure of my personal data (please tick the relevant boxes):
consents.health: I consent to the collection and processing of my health data by L'OCCITANE, to ensure that the Spa treatments and services are appropriate for my individual needs and health condition, and for my safety during treatment.
consents.marketing_intro: I agree to receive news, offers and personalised content from L'OCCITANE by:

errors.cpf_invalid: Invalid CPF number. Please check and try again.
errors.passport_invalid: Invalid passport. Use only letters and numbers (5–20 characters).
errors.email: A valid email address is required.
errors.phone: Invalid phone number. Use Brazilian (85 99999-9999) or international (+...).
errors.medical: Please describe any relevant medical information.
errors.health_consent: Consent to health data processing is required.
errors.generic: Please complete all required fields before submitting.
errors.server: An error occurred while submitting. Please try again.
errors.room_invalid: Room not found. Check the number (ex: 0501, 1401).

success.title: Form submitted successfully!
success.message: Your profile has been recorded. The therapist will confirm your availability for treatment.

already_answered.title: This intake form has already been submitted.
already_answered.message: Thank you for your response! If you have any questions, please contact the SPA reception.

expired_link.title: This link is no longer available.
expired_link.message: The intake form link expired after the treatment time. If you have any questions, please contact the SPA reception.
